title: So Proud She Was To Die
content:
So proud she was to die
    It made us all ashamed
    That what we cherished, so unknown
    To her desire seemed.

    So satisfied to go
    Where none of us should be,
    Immediately, that anguish stooped
    Almost to jealousy.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "So Proud She Was To Die"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
